top_signals.title: Nvidia Earnings Can Affirm Chip Stock Rally or Spur Market Chaos
top_signals.summary: For much of the year, chip stocks have been powering the market higher. Now, Nvidia Corp.’s earnings have a chance to confirm that the rally has more room to run — or add another brick to investors’ wall of worry.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Indonesia is at a perpendicular intersection of two different roads
top_signals.summary: Is this the worst ageing fuel subsidy in the world?
